HGSS.523.0000:
Sabrina: I knew you were coming...\f
Three years ago I had a vision of
your arrival. You’re after my Badge.\f
I don’t enjoy battling, but it’s my
duty as a Gym Leader to confer\r
Badges on anyone who has proven\r
him- or herself worthy.\f
Since you wish it, I will show you my
psychic powers!\f
HGSS.523.0001:
Sabrina: Your power...
It far exceeds what I foresaw...\f
Maybe it isn’t possible to fully
predict what the future holds...\f
OK, you win. You earned yourself
the Marsh Badge.\f
HGSS.523.0003:
Sabrina: I failed to accurately predict
your power. That means that your\r
power is beyond my psychic ability.\f
You deserve this.
Please take this TM, too!\f
HGSS.523.0004:
Sabrina: It contains Skill Swap!
It swaps Abilities between the user\r
and the target.\f
You will become a celebrated and
beloved Champion!
HGSS.523.0005:
Sabrina: Your love for your Pokémon
smashed my psychic abilities...\f
The ability to love, I think, is some
kind of psychic ability...
HGSS.523.0006:
Yo, legend in the making!\f
A Trainer as skilled as you doesn’t
need to be told how to deal\r
with Psychic-type Pokémon, right?\f
I expect great things from you!\f
Good luck!
HGSS.523.0009:
Saffron City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Sabrina
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
